title: PrinterBug / SpoolSample Authentication Coercion
description: Detects exploitation of the MS-RPRN PrinterBug (SpoolSample / printerbug.py) to coerce a target (often a DC) into authenticating to an attacker host. Used to relay or to capture a TGT from an unconstrained-delegation host. Distinct from the already-covered PetitPotam (MS-EFSRPC) coercion.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*SpoolSample*' or 'Command Line' like '*printerbug*' or 'Command Line' like '*dementor*' or 'Command Line' like '*RpcRemoteFindFirstPrinterChangeNotification*' or 'Command Line' like '*MS-RPRN*')))
